flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Indiana University-Northwest are 10% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($43.4k vs $48.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana University-Northwest fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Indiana University-Northwest rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (64.2% → 71.4%).
